mapper.select: SELECT a.ARTICLE_ID AS articleId, a.TITLE AS title, a.SUMMARY AS summary, a.COVER_IMAGE_ID AS coverImageId, a.CATEGORY AS category, a.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, a.FAVORITE_COUNT AS favoriteCount, a.PUBLISHED_AT AS publishedAt, e.TEXT_FINGERPRINT AS textFingerprint FROM ARTICLES a LEFT JOIN ARTICLE_EMBEDDINGS e ON e.ARTICLE_ID = a.ARTICLE_ID WHERE a.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND a.STATUS = 3 ORDER BY a.PUBLISHED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT TAG_NAME FROM ARTICLE_TAGS WHERE ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT a.CATEGORY AS category, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM ARTICLE_USER_READS r JOIN ARTICLES a ON a.ARTICLE_ID = r.ARTICLE_ID WHERE r.USER_ID = #{userId} AND r.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND r.READ_AT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY a.CATEGORY UNION ALL SELECT a.CATEGORY AS category, COUNT(1) * 2 AS cnt FROM ARTICLE_FAVORITES f JOIN ARTICLES a ON a.ARTICLE_ID = f.ARTICLE_ID WHERE f.USER_ID = #{userId} AND f.IS_ACTIVE = 1 AND f.DEL_FLAG = 0 GROUP BY a.CATEGORY
SELECT ARTICLE_ID FROM ARTICLE_USER_READS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 AND READ_AT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT ARTICLE_ID FROM ARTICLE_FAVORITES WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 1 AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTICLE_USER_READS (READ_ID, USER_ID, ARTICLE_ID, READ_DURATION, READ_SOURCE, READ_AT, DEL_FLAG) VALUES (#{readId}, #{userId}, #{articleId}, #{durationSec}, #{source}, NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE READ_DURATION = GREATEST(COALESCE(READ_DURATION, 0), COALESCE(#{durationSec}, 0)), READ_SOURCE = COALESCE(#{source}, READ_SOURCE), READ_AT = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE ARTICLE_RECOMMENDATIONS SET DEL_FLAG = 1 WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTICLE_RECOMMENDATIONS ( REC_ID, USER_ID, ARTICLE_ID, REC_SCORE, REC_REASON, REC_BATCH_ID, REC_PHASE, DIFY_RUN_ID, EXPIRED_AT, DEL_FLAG, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{recId}, #{userId}, #{articleId}, #{recScore}, #{recReason}, #{batchId}, #{recPhase}, #{difyRunId}, #{expiredAt}, 0, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT r.ARTICLE_ID AS articleId, r.REC_SCORE AS recScore, r.REC_REASON AS recReason, r.REC_PHASE AS recPhase, a.TITLE AS title, a.SUMMARY AS summary, a.COVER_IMAGE_ID AS coverImageId, a.CATEGORY AS category, a.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, a.PUBLISHED_AT AS publishedAt FROM ARTICLE_RECOMMENDATIONS r JOIN ARTICLES a ON a.ARTICLE_ID = r.ARTICLE_ID WHERE r.USER_ID = #{userId} AND r.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND (r.EXPIRED_AT IS NULL OR r.EXPIRED_AT > NOW()) AND a.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND a.STATUS = 3 ORDER BY r.REC_SCORE DESC, r.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARTICLE_EMBEDDINGS (ARTICLE_ID, TEXT_FINGERPRINT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{fingerprint}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE TEXT_FINGERPRINT = #{fingerprint}, UPDATED_AT = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT TEXT_FINGERPRINT FROM ARTICLE_EMBEDDINGS WHERE ARTICLE_ID = #{articleId}
